brand_identity.name: AgroYousfi
brand_identity.description: A fusion of traditional Algerian agriculture and modern e-commerce efficiency. The design should feel like 'Digital Clay'—grounded, organic, yet precise.
brand_identity.archetype: Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) with a Swiss Utility twist for data

layout.spacing_scale: Generous (2x standard). Use p-8, p-12 for sections.
layout.border_radius: rounded-xl (12px) for cards, rounded-full for buttons

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-8 py-6

cards.product: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group
cards.feature: bg-muted/50 border-none hover:bg-muted transition-colors rounded-3xl p-8

inputs.style: bg-input border-2 border-border focus:border-primary rounded-lg h-12 px-4

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain overlay on the main background to give a 'paper' feel.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React. Use stroke-width={1.5} for a refined look.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Implement 'dir=rtl' on the root HTML element for Arabic support.
CRITICAL: Use the 'Tajawal' font for all Arabic text. It is essential for legibility.
Do not use standard Shadcn 'slate' colors. Override them with the 'Warm Beige' and 'Deep Green' palette provided.
For the Hero section, use a 'Split Layout' or 'Asymmetric Grid' rather than a centered text over image.
Ensure all prices are displayed clearly in DZD (e.g., '1,500 د.ج').
Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Categories section.
For the Admin Dashboard, switch to a denser 'Swiss Utility' layout but keep the brand colors.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop' - no generic centered layouts.
Create depth through z-index and layered elements.
Use glassmorphism sparingly (only for sticky headers/overlays).
Never use 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic agricultural placeholder text (e.g., 'Premium Wheat Seeds', 'Organic Fertilizer').
